core/product/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/product/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONProductCertifications

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/product/v1#IONProductCertifications

PropertyMandatoryDescription
halalStatusalwaysHalal certification status. MANDATORY for all food and beverage products. Strongly recommended for cosmetics and pharmac
halalCertNumberconditionalMUI (Majelis Ulama Indonesia) halal certificate number. Format varies by certification period.
bpomRegNumberoptionalBPOM registration number for food, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. BPOM_MD: domestic product (e.g. MD-123456789012). BPO
sniCertNumberoptionalSNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) compliance certificate number. Required for products with mandatory SNI (electronics, P
spPIRTNumberoptionalSP-P-IRT small-scale home food production license. For UMKM food sellers without full BPOM registration.
ageRestrictedalwaysWhether this product requires age verification at point of purchase. True for tobacco, alcohol, adult content, and certa
minAgeconditionalMinimum purchaser age in years when ageRestricted is true. Indonesia: 18 for tobacco and alcohol, 21 for certain substan

Pack README

ion-core/product/v1

Indonesian product certifications — halal status (MUI), BPOM, SNI, age restriction.

Attaches to

`beckn:Resource.resourceAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/product/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
